docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ACEVEDO, ANTOINETTE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,237.55 FILED BY CRESCENT JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT ACEVEDO, ANTOINETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE DEFT. RETURNED FROM THE POST OFFICE WITH REMARK RETURNED TO SENDER & NO REASON WAS MARKED FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRESCENT JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACEVEDO, ANTOINETTE $1,237.55 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,342.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
